• Interactive ASCII art canvas that generates wave patterns following mouse movements
  • Uses monospace characters to create dynamic wave animations with configurable parameters
  • Implements efficient rendering with single DOM updates and bounding box optimization
    const CHARS = '@#S%?*+;:,. ';
    const WAVE_DURATION = 800;
    const MAX_RADIUS = 30;

Creates an interactive ASCII art canvas that responds to mouse movements by generating dynamic wave patterns using monospace characters. The application efficiently renders animations by updating the entire screen in a single DOM operation and uses bounding box optimization to only process affected areas. Users can interact with the canvas to create visually appealing wave effects that propagate from the cursor position.
